judge_reason: Description B quotes specific verbatim labels like 'Dirt Berm', 'General Area of Footprints', and 'Berm' that are not present in Description A, indicating contradictory claims about text within the image.
original_image_tags: A hand-drawn pencil diagram on aged, tan-colored paper. The sketch depicts a quadrilateral or trapezoidal shape with vertices labeled "#1", "#2", "#3", and "#4". Lines connect the vertices, forming the sides and diagonals of the shape. Measurements and angles are annotated along the lines. Labels and text are handwritten around the diagram.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Hand-drawn sketch of a rectangular footprint with diagonal cross-lines, four corner marks labeled “Dirt Burn,” and handwritten measurements/angles including 9' 7½", 14' 5½", 14' 9½", 19' 6½", 13' 2½", 10½", and 40°/45° annotations, with the note “GENERAL AREA OF ‘FOOTPRINTS’.”*
